mainEntity.name: What is reverse charge mechanism in GST?

acceptedAnswer.text: reverse charge mechanism in GST is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.

Timing depends on the specific regulatory trigger, statutory deadline, or transaction requirement. Virtual Auditor recommends proactive planning to avoid penalties and compliance gaps. Contact our team for timeline-specific guidance.

mainEntity.name: Can ITC be claimed on RCM payments?

acceptedAnswer.text: This depends on the specific facts and regulatory framework applicable to your situation. Virtual Auditor provides case-specific advisory after understanding your circumstances. Call +91-99622 60333 for a preliminary assessment.

mainEntity.name: Is RCM applicable on import of services?

acceptedAnswer.text: The answer depends on the specific provisions of the applicable Act/regulation and your factual situation. Virtual Auditor provides definitive advisory backed by FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV credentials. Contact us for clarity.

mainEntity.name: What is the time of supply for RCM?

acceptedAnswer.text: the time of supply for RCM is a professional service/compliance requirement under Indian regulatory framework. Virtual Auditor provides expert advisory on this through our team led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer). Contact us at +91-99622 60333 for a detailed consultation.
